title: Enable the thinking engine
subtitle: MetaMates is built around chat and slash commands on the right. Pick one assistant—about 2 minutes to install and sign in.

pick.hint: Pick one as your daily default—you can add more later in Settings.

install.title: Install {{name}}
install.hint: MetaMates installs the assistant locally—no terminal required.

auth.title: Sign in to {{name}}
auth.hint: After install, sign in so the thinking engine can read and write your vault.
auth.ready: Sign-in looks good—you can start chatting.
auth.codebuddyHint: CodeBuddy often works right after install. If not, check Settings → AI assistants.
auth.codexHint: After installing Codex, confirm sign-in and connection under Settings → AI assistants.

done.title: Thinking engine is ready
done.subtitle: Chat on the right, or try /today for a daily plan—results land in your vault.
done.firstMessageHint: Try: “Run /today to generate my plan from the vault.”

actions.vaultOnlyHint: No chat or /today, /graduate, etc. You can enable the engine later from the right panel or Settings.

vaultReminder.message: You chose vault-only for now. Enable the thinking engine to chat and use /today and other commands.

errors.noElectron: This feature is only available in the desktop app
